source: hdiutil create -size 10m -fs APFS -volname STRATA-APFS -type SPARSE; populate; dd to flat

/.fseventsd.note: macOS auto-created metadata; walker surfaces it

notes: Generated on macOS via hdiutil + newfs_apfs. Not byte-deterministic — regeneration produces a different volume UUID and checkpoint XIDs. Tests match on structural invariants, not byte hashes.

Validated Session 1.5 against external apfs crate v0.2.4: 7/7 core parser checks passed (root enum, 3-level nested walk, small-file read, multi-extent read, deep-nested read, walk() all 9 paths, stat kind/size/mode/uid/gid/nlink).
The committed fixture at this exact path is the one Session 1.5 probe used — /tmp/apfs_probe_fixture.img moved here unchanged.
